'''G'rinn Go city''' was located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]]. The [[City/Legends|city]] was noted for its great markets, and [[Bungo Bung]] sold [[boaboo juice]] cultivated from his father's farm there.

{{City-stub}}
